creator: byronkatz@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #16)
I didn't, actually.  After you mentioned it, I went ahead and ran it, and...now I cannot log in:
in try_dlopen(): /usr/lib/pam_opie.so.5: Shared object "libopie.so.8" not found
in openpam_load_module(): no pam_opie.so found
pam_start(): system error

heh.  Ah well.  I'm going to build 10.2 and go to that now.  Thanks for your help.
